task_description: Phase 19: Real Realtime Media - Replace fake SFU with LiveKit gateway, add WebRTC frontend components, implement QuantChat calls, QuantMax random video chat matchmaking, TURN server infrastructure, and E2E encryption support.

verification.summary: pnpm typecheck 80/80 tasks pass, pnpm test 82/82 tasks pass, pnpm lint passes. Semantic review identified 8 issues; 5 critical ones fixed (partner token leak, leave/end asymmetry, TURN RBAC, image pinning, TTL docs). 3 remaining are documented acceptable tradeoffs (in-memory state, webhook idempotency, client-side enforcement for knock/polls).
